Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Huh... I didn't know they made ones like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}If I was gonna bother to wear one, I should've shopped around more before deciding...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Wait... Since when were you so bold about that stuff?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I guess I'll take it as a compliment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But still, yukatas are a bit... how should I say, "breezy"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's great for warm weather, but the fabric is so thin... I don't know how people get used to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I guess women in the old days were just that laid-back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Geez... I wasn't expecting that! I tripped over my own words...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But still, yukatas are a bit... how should I say, "breezy"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's great for warm weather, but the fabric is so thin... I don't know how people get used to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I guess women in the old days were just that laid-back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I guess it's dinner time, huh? No wonder I'm so hungry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun, wanna get some takoyaki?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I don't think I could eat the whole thing by myself, so why don't we share an order?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hi, I'd like one order of takoyaki, please![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Let's see... Could I have some extra seaweed and bonito flakes? And go easy on the mayo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Gotcha! Comin' riiight up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I threw in one extra just for you. Hope you and your boyfriend enjoy it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Did you hear that, {f 4 1}-kun? She called you my boyfriend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Sorry... I know I shouldn't talk with my mouth full.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I was trying to say that it tastes like Octopia. You know, the place by the station?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Hey, wait a minute... Do you think that lady at the stand was the same person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I've never seen those in person before![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Look, there's a dog one! Hey, doesn't it look a bit like Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Oh, right... This shrine is his home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Do you think they made that mask to honor him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Then again, this shop only came here for the festival... Maybe I'm just imagining it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Гей! Хочете перевірити удачу в лотереї?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Можете створити гарні спогади, еге? Шанси виглядають добренько — залишилося багато виграшних квитків![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}A lucky draw, huh... What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}He said the odds are good. Want to give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Коробка наповнена[n]трикутними лотерейними квитками...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ось ваш приз. Насолоджуйтеся![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}（アイテム名）を受け取った。[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ось ваш приз. Насолоджуйтеся![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}（アイテム名）を受け取った。[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I always assumed these things were rigged...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}This might be the first time I've seen someone actually win something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I thought we'd see some of our classmates here, but I guess not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I have to admit, I'm a little disappointed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Still, I'm glad we got to enjoy the festivities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Thanks for today! I had a lot of fun, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Let's go somewhere together again soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ми вирішили повернутися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}
